data.title: PYC Therapeutics Issues New Shares Following Option Exercise and Lodges Cleansing Notice
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

PYC Therapeutics Limited ( (AU:PYC) ) has provided an update.

PYC Therapeutics has issued 250,000 fully paid ordinary shares following the exercise of an equivalent number of unlisted options priced at $0.90 each, with an expiry date in October 2027. The new shares are being quoted on the ASX, modestly increasing the company’s share capital and reflecting continued engagement with its long-term incentive arrangements.

The company also lodged a cleansing notice under section 708A(5)(e) of the Corporations Act, confirming that the shares were issued without a prospectus and that PYC remains compliant with its continuous disclosure and financial reporting obligations. By affirming that there is no excluded information requiring disclosure, PYC signals regulatory transparency to investors and supports the tradability of the newly issued shares on the market.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PYC) stock is a Buy with a A$2.84 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PYC Therapeutics Limited stock, see the AU:PYC Stock Forecast page.

More about PYC Therapeutics Limited

PYC Therapeutics Limited is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing a new generation of RNA therapies for patients with genetic diseases that currently lack treatment options. The company leverages a proprietary drug delivery platform to boost the potency of precision medicines within the expanding RNA therapeutics market, concentrating on monogenic diseases that offer a higher likelihood of clinical development success.

Average Trading Volume: 1,507,284

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$1.27B

data.title: Talisman Mining Director’s Options Lapse, Equity Exposure Trimmed
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Talisman Mining Limited ( (AU:TLM) ) has provided an announcement.

Talisman Mining Limited has disclosed a change in director Brian Dawes’ interests following the expiry of a tranche of unlisted options. Dawes held a mix of direct and indirect ordinary shareholdings, as well as several series of unlisted options with varying exercise prices and maturities.

The notice confirms that 222,600 unlisted options exercisable at $0.252 and expiring on 22 April 2026 have lapsed without being exercised, with no new securities acquired. As a result, Dawes’ direct and indirect ordinary shareholdings remain unchanged, while his overall option exposure is reduced, marginally decreasing his potential future equity-based participation in the company.

More about Talisman Mining Limited

Talisman Mining Limited is an Australian-listed resources company engaged in mineral exploration and development. The company focuses on identifying and advancing base and precious metal projects, with its securities traded on the ASX, and its leadership team holding equity interests aligned with shareholder outcomes.

Average Trading Volume: 199,240

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$16.57M

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Qinhuangdao Port Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3369) ) has issued an announcement.

Qinhuangdao Port Co., Ltd. has called its 2025 annual general meeting for 26 June 2026 in Qinhuangdao, Hebei Province, to present the board report, final financial results, and a 2025 profit distribution plan including a proposed final dividend. Shareholders will also vote on reappointing the external auditor and internal control auditor for 2026, confirming 2025 directors’ remuneration, and approving the 2026 remuneration framework and new measures for directors and senior management.

The notice details registration, proxy, and documentation procedures for both individual and corporate H-shareholders wishing to attend or vote by proxy, including the closure of the share register from 23 to 26 June 2026 to determine AGM eligibility. These arrangements outline key governance and compensation decisions that may affect investor returns, oversight of the company’s financial reporting, and alignment of management incentives with shareholder interests.

More about Qinhuangdao Port Co., Ltd. Class H

Qinhuangdao Port Co., Ltd. is a joint stock limited liability company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong. The company operates port facilities in Qinhuangdao, Hebei Province, supporting maritime trade and logistics through cargo handling and related port services for domestic and international customers.

Solaris Australian Equity Income Plus Ltd. ( (AU:SET) ) has shared an announcement.

Solaris Australian Equity Income Plus Ltd., an ASX-listed Australian equity income investment company, invests in a portfolio of local shares and cash, aiming to deliver income and growth for its shareholders. The company regularly reports its net tangible asset position to keep investors informed about the underlying value of its portfolio.

The company reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset backing of $1.964 per share as at 27 April 2026, based on unaudited daily portfolio valuations and cash balances. This NTA figure, which is adjusted for management fees and certain operating costs and tax items but excludes unrealised tax on gains and franking credits, provides investors with an updated gauge of the underlying value supporting the SET share price.

Solaris Australian Equity Income Plus Ltd. is an Australian listed investment company focused on equity income, providing investors with exposure to a portfolio of Australian shares designed to generate regular income and capital growth. Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) has provided an announcement.

Siemens Energy AG has scheduled the release of its group half-year report for the 2026 financial year, covering the period from October 1, 2025 to March 31, 2026. The report is set to be published on May 12, 2026 on the company’s investor relations website, in line with regulatory disclosure requirements under German securities law.

The announcement signals the upcoming disclosure of key financial and operational metrics that will inform investors about Siemens Energy’s mid-year performance and outlook. data.title: Beat Holdings Resets EGM Record Date and Aligns AGM to Cut Costs
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Beat Holdings ( (JP:9399) ).

Beat Holdings has reset the record date for an extraordinary general meeting to 13 May 2026, replacing the original June 2025 date after agenda items remained undecided for more than 10 months. The move is intended to ensure that current shareholders, including those behind multiple revised proposals, can fully exercise their voting rights when the EGM is eventually convened.

The company has also set 13 May 2026 as the record date for its 2026 annual general meeting, aligning it with the EGM to reduce preparation and administrative costs. Beat aims to hold both meetings on the same day, a step that could streamline governance procedures while the detailed dates, venues and agendas will be announced once finalized.

More about Beat Holdings

Beat Holdings Limited is a global investment company incorporated in the Cayman Islands and headquartered in Hong Kong, with subsidiaries across Asia and Canada. Through Xinhua Mobile it acquires and licenses intellectual property rights, while GINSMS Inc., listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, provides mobile messaging and software services; Beat itself is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 3,979,726

Current Market Cap: Yen5.32B

data.title: UBS Group Ceases to Be Substantial Shareholder in Lindian Resources
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Lindian Resources Limited ( (AU:LIN) ) is now available.

UBS Group AG and its related bodies corporate have notified Lindian Resources Limited that they have ceased to be a substantial shareholder as of 24 April 2026. The change, formalised in a substantial holder notice lodged on 28 April 2026, indicates UBS’s voting power in Lindian has fallen below the substantial holding threshold, potentially altering the company’s institutional investor base and signalling a shift in its share register composition.

While detailed transaction data is contained in an appendix, the core outcome is that UBS no longer holds a reportable controlling stake in the company’s voting securities. This may affect perceptions of market support from major global financial institutions, although ownership changes of this nature are common in listed resource companies and do not in themselves indicate an operational change at Lindian.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:LIN) stock is a Buy with a A$0.91 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lindian Resources Limited stock, see the AU:LIN Stock Forecast page.

More about Lindian Resources Limited

Lindian Resources Limited is an Australian-listed company in the resources sector. The filing does not specify its primary commodities or projects, but it is subject to Australian corporate disclosure rules regarding substantial shareholdings.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$1.63B

R3D Resources Limited ( (AU:TAT) ) has issued an announcement.

Tartana Minerals Limited has updated its disclosure to confirm the issuance of a total of 61,166,677 unquoted options, comprising 56,666,677 options plus an additional 4,500,000 options, all in the same class. The clarification of the aggregate options issued provides greater transparency around the company’s capital structure and potential future dilution for existing shareholders, which may influence investor assessment of Tartana’s funding strategy and valuation.

The update amends an earlier notice lodged on the same date, ensuring that the market is fully informed of the precise volume of unquoted equity instruments on issue. By formalising the corrected options total, Tartana is aligning its regulatory reporting with ASX requirements, which can support market confidence in the company’s governance and disclosure practices.

More about R3D Resources Limited

Tartana Minerals Limited, listed on the ASX under the code TAT, operates in the mining and resources sector. The company focuses on mineral exploration and development, positioning itself within Australia’s broader resources industry and targeting opportunities that can be advanced through structured funding and equity-based incentives.

data.title: Tartana Directors Update Interests Following Capital Raisings
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from R3D Resources Limited ( (AU:TAT) ) is now available.

Tartana Minerals Limited, an Australian explorer and project developer, focuses on critical and strategic metals such as silver, copper, gold, antimony, zinc and tin in the Chillagoe region of Far North Queensland. The company also produces copper sulphate from its Tartana Mining Leases, underpinning current operations while it advances exploration and development across its broader portfolio.

The company has lodged directors’ interest notices reflecting various share and option issuances approved by shareholders on 30 March 2026. These include directors’ participation in December 2025 and February 2026 equity placements, along with attached options issued in late April, signalling alignment of board interests with recent capital raisings and the company’s ongoing growth strategy.

More about R3D Resources Limited

Tartana Minerals Limited is an Australian mineral explorer and project developer with substantial landholdings in the Chillagoe region of Far North Queensland. The company holds mining leases and exploration tenements targeting critical and strategic metals, including silver, copper, gold, antimony, zinc and tin, and produces copper sulphate from its Tartana Mining Leases to support ongoing operations.
